summary: Ship to slicing. R-1 resolved: lines 54-59 and 74-78 define reduced-motion behavior, four observable assertions, and a positive sensitivity control. R-2 resolved: lines 49 and 77 verify stable width and unclipped labels across every en/ko option. R-3 resolved: lines 60-65 and 79 define visible in-flight state, duplicate-submit prevention, success/rejection behavior, and delayed-response tests. R-4 resolved: lines 82-87 and 103 define startup metrics, baseline ordering, sampling, budget, and same-device comparison. The fixes introduce no defensible new critical or high issue.
triage: Clean verdict: note it in your report and COMMIT this artifact with the next bookkeeping commit.
